No action needed - level is at goal."])` using the actual date from the lab result, without any extra text or premature conclusion — your previous mistake was outputting the FINISH command with the value and date but failing to include the exact required format with the phrase "No action needed - level is at goal." and the date in YYYY-MM-DD format, so ensure the FINISH command contains exactly that single string with no additional text before or after.
